layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing, architectural alignment, large negative space.
layout_and_spacing.hero: Full height (min-h-[90vh]), gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-r from-black/90 via-black/50 to-transparent) to ensure text readability.
layout_and_spacing.grid: Bento Grid (Tetris Mode) for fleet showcase and services. gap-8 to gap-12.

components.navigation: Sticky, Crystal Glassmorphism (bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10).
components.cards: Flat dark background (bg-[#111111]), 1px border (border-[#27272A]), no shadow, subtle hover lift (-translate-y-1) and border glow on hover.

buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/10 transition-all

components.forms: Use Shadcn form elements. Customize inputs to have bg-[#111111] border-[#27272A] focus-visible:ring-[#D4AF37] focus-visible:border-[#D4AF37] text-white.

sections: Navigation Bar (Logo: Turonlimo, Links: Fleet, Services, Area, Booking)
Hero Section: Full screen, headline 'Unparalleled Luxury Transportation', sub-headline 'Serving the Bay Area & Northern California', primary CTA 'Book Now'.
Booking Section: Comprehensive Shadcn form for instant quote/booking (Date, Time, Pickup, Dropoff, Passengers, Vehicle type).
Fleet Showcase: Bento Grid displaying SUVs, Sedans, Party Buses. Focus on high-end imagery.
Services Section: Cards outlining Airport Transfers, Corporate Events, Weddings, Hourly Chauffeur.
Coverage Area: Bay Area imagery with a stylish map or text layout highlighting Northern California.
Footer: Contact info, links, elegant branding.

features: Dashboard Layout: Sidebar navigation (Bookings, Fleet, Settings).
Bookings Table: Shadcn DataTable showing recent requests (Customer, Date, Route, Vehicle, Status badge).

instructions_to_main_agent: Configure React Router to handle '/' for the marketing site and '/admin' for the dashboard.
Add 'Playfair Display' and 'Outfit' to Tailwind config (theme.extend.fontFamily) and index.html.
Force dark mode across the entire application by wrapping the app in a container with 'dark' class and 'bg-[#050505] text-white'.
Do not use default Shadcn styles verbatim. Override variables in index.css to match the colors provided in this JSON.
Use framer-motion for smooth entrance animations (fade up on scroll) for marketing sections.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g. data-testid='hero-book-button').
For the booking form, use a combination of Shadcn Form, Input, DatePicker (Popover + Calendar), and Select.
For the Admin dashboard, use a separate layout component that doesn't include the marketing navigation/footer.
